results.rendered_html:
utsanna p. p.
1 Decayed.
2 Destroyed, ruined, uprooted, left
(pb) off; utsannosmi  K. 164  undone; makaradhvaja ivotsannavigrahaḥ  K. 54 ;  Bg. 1. 44 ; ˚nidrā  K. 171 ; utsanno yudhiṣṭhiraḥ  Ve. 2  extirpated.
3 Curseed, wretched;  K. 198. 
4 Fallen into disuse, extinct (as a book).
5 Finished, completed.
6 Risen, increased (opp. avasanna).
7 Accomplished easily (Ved.).
